description: Root record for a customer onboarding case under the Customer Identification Program (USA PATRIOT §326 / 31 CFR 1020.220) and Customer Due Diligence (FATF Rec 10). Orchestrator-emitted — every downstream screening/disposition/decision record references this case by caseId. riskRating selects the diligence band (SDD simplified / CDD standard / EDD enhanced); EDD cases carry heightened scrutiny. Notarize-only: binds who is being onboarded, for what product, in what jurisdiction.

customerRef.description: Internal identifier for the prospective customer (no PII on-chain — a reference into the KYC system of record).

riskRating.description: Diligence band: SDD simplified | CDD standard | EDD enhanced.

jurisdiction.description: Booking jurisdiction (ISO country or regulator scope).

beneficialOwnerOf.description: Optional. caseId of the parent legal-entity case when this is a beneficial-owner sub-case (CDD beneficial-ownership rule).
